executor: Lane_01 code agent (CLAC-1) on Vultr Windows Server
intent: Build cross-Lane handoff validator + GitHub Action workflow consuming existing lane_message.schema.json + lane_response.schema.json. Validate filename + path + schema for every MSG/RSP in handoffs/.

discovery.decision: Use as-is per R-CANON-02 — do NOT modify; existing canon is richer (14 required fields including message_type, priority, status, requested_action enum) than spec's AC1 listed (those are subset of existing schema).
additional_schemas_present: contracts/handoff.schema.json (HOF- IDs — separate from MSG/RSP, not in this validator's scope)

validator_design.filename_detection: First 4 chars: 'MSG-' → lane_message schema; 'RSP-' → lane_response schema
validator_design.path_validation: MSG-* MUST be in handoffs/inbox/**/*.json; RSP-* MUST be in handoffs/outbox/**/*.json
validator_design.lane_consistency: MSG: filename embeds 'MSG-LFROM-LTO-' — must match JSON from_lane/to_lane fields. RSP: response_id pattern looser, skip lane consistency check (RSP filename pattern not standardized).

valid: handoff_valid_msg_minimal.json — minimal MSG conforming to schema
invalid: handoff_invalid_msg_path_lane_mismatch.json — JSON content claims from_lane=Lane_03 but filename has 'L01'
handoff_invalid_msg_wrong_path.json — MSG- file placed in handoffs/outbox/ (wrong path)
